member.name: T:Shapes.ImmediateModeShapeDrawerEditor
member.summary: A helper type to inherit from when you want an inspector/editor that draws immediate mode shapes

member.name: M:Shapes.ImmediateModeShapeDrawerEditor.DrawShapes(UnityEngine.Camera)
member.summary: Override this to draw Shapes in immediate mode. This is called once per camera. You can draw using this code: using(Draw.Command(cam)){ // Draw here }
member.param: The camera that is currently rendering
